reasoning: The control AC-3(14) focuses on access enforcement, which directly maps to Kubernetes RBAC controls. Ensuring that no cluster-wide admin privileges are granted unnecessarily, enforcing least privilege, and managing service account tokens are critical to individual access control in Kubernetes. These checks ensure that access is appropriately restricted and managed at the individual level, aligning with the intent of the control.
title: Access Enforcement - Access enforcement | individual access nist sp 800-53, r ev
